final:
module top_module(clk, rst, out, in);input wire clk;            
  input wire rst;            
  input wire [31:0] in;      
  output reg [31:0] out;     


  always@(posedge clk) begin

    if (rst) begin
      out <= 32'b0;
    end

    
    else begin
      out <= in;
    end
    
  end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      out <= ~in;
    end
  end

endmodule
